characters.description: A formidable travelling cultivator and Falling Leaf's close companion. He readily aids mortals in danger, but is already concerned that a true devil he previously fought may have survived and may seek revenge.
characters.name: Sen

characters.description: Sen's Ghost Panther companion, who meets Laughing River and Misty Peak while travelling with him.
characters.name: Falling Leaf

characters.description: A nine-tailed fox travelling with his granddaughter, Misty Peak. He owes Sen a favor.
characters.name: Laughing River

characters.description: A nine-tailed fox travelling with her grandfather, Laughing River.
characters.name: Misty Peak

characters.description: A young orphan whose parents have been killed. Sen has assumed responsibility for keeping her safe, while Falling Leaf regards her as a vulnerable child who will eventually need to learn how to defend herself.
characters.name: Orphaned girl

characters.description: A powerful cultivator known to be among Sen's allies.
characters.name: Feng

characters.description: One of Sen's powerful established allies. Her reputation is familiar to the foxes, who count her among the people likely to answer serious harm done to Sen.
characters.name: Caihong

characters.description: A powerful elder and established ally of Sen. The foxes recognize him as part of the formidable circle surrounding the travelling cultivator.
characters.name: Kho

characters.description: A spider spirit beast who protects the orphaned child with an intricate qi web. He accepts Sen's instruction that living among humans will require him to learn to read.
characters.name: Glimmer of Night

characters.description: A nascent-soul cultivator who begins training Sen in shadow travel. She also handles much of the orphaned girl's practical care while Sen trains.
characters.name: Nascent-soul shadow instructor

characters.description: The nascent-soul cultivator who trains Sen in shadow travel and comforts the orphaned girl during Sen's absence.
characters.name: Auntie Rue

characters.description: The orphaned girl under Sen's protection, now known as Blue Eye. She is beginning to trust Sen and Glimmer of Night as familiar protectors, though grief for her dead parents still brings nightmares and fear of being left behind.
characters.name: Blue Eye

characters.description: An epithet Misty Peak uses when addressing Sen.
characters.name: Judgment's Gale

characters.description: Sen's formidable mentor, whose reputation discourages other powerful cultivators from moving against him. Even that protection cannot make Sen immune to the consequences of defying stronger figures.
characters.name: Feng Ming

characters.description: The orphaned girl previously known as Blue Eye. Now living under Sen's protection, she is learning to read and write, forming a friendship in town, and becoming part of the daily life shared by Sen, Falling Leaf, and Glimmer of Night.
characters.name: Liu Ai

characters.description: A gruff local innkeeper who befriends Blue Eye and becomes protective of her.
characters.name: Grizzled innkeeper

characters.description: The grizzled innkeeper, now identified as a former spearman. Sen directs him to help train the townspeople, though he says his skills are rusty and he has no teaching experience.
characters.name: Veteran mortal spear instructor

characters.description: A local craftswoman who shelters the orphaned girl when Sen leaves to stop a spirit-beast attack.
characters.name: Seamstress

characters.description: A core-formation cultivator and former acquaintance of Sen who arrives with a foundation-formation companion. She recognizes Sen as Judgment's Gale.
characters.name: Core-formation visitor

characters.description: A foundation-formation cultivator accompanying the core-formation former acquaintance who arrives to see Sen.
characters.name: Foundation-formation visitor

characters.description: Caihong's husband and one of Sen's concerned elders. After reading Sen's account of taking Liu Ai into his care, he and Caihong decide to travel to them.
characters.name: Jaw-Long

characters.description: A pale woman with blue eyes who has reached core formation. She continues pursuing a place at the academy after Sen refuses to become her cultivation master.
characters.name: Pale, blue-eyed core cultivator

characters.description: A prospective academy student with water and wood affinities who has lacked guidance in advancing. Sen prepares a tailored breakthrough elixir for her and offers a suitable cycling method and protection during her tribulation.
characters.name: Qi-gathering academy applicant

characters.description: Sen's royal friend, who calls him to the capital for a court event involving representatives from abroad.
characters.name: King

characters.description: A peak core-formation leader from a lightning-marked sect. He arrives at Sen's academy with two other cultivators, asserts a right to enter, and has a difficult personal history with the resident sword instructor.
characters.name: Lightning-sect leader

characters.description: A core cultivator who survives Sen's confrontation with a lightning-marked sect delegation. After the delegation's leader is killed and the remaining visitors are expelled, he decides to give his sect an honest account.
characters.name: Male lightning-sect survivor

characters.description: A core cultivator who survives Sen's confrontation with a lightning-marked sect delegation. She leaves her fellow survivor rather than face the risk that their sect will sacrifice them to appease Sen.
characters.name: Female lightning-sect survivor

characters.description: A core-formation cultivator who reaches Orchard's Reach seeking a contact connected to Sen and his spear training. She learns that the person she sought has already travelled west to see Sen.
characters.name: Li Yi Nuo

characters.description: An absent ruler whose serpent envoy is connected to organized spirit-beast attacks on human settlements. Feng Ming sends the envoy back with a warning against continuing the campaign.
characters.name: Spirit-beast king

characters.description: The academy's resident sword instructor, previously known only as the core-formation visitor. Her patient, student-focused teaching earns Sen's public endorsement and his confidence that she can manage the academy while he is away.
characters.name: Wu Meng Yao

characters.description: A human associate who is deeply concerned about Sen's safety. As he prepares to answer a royal summons, she warns him that the capital remains dangerous.
characters.name: Fu Ru Lan
